particulars.description: All estates or interests in any present freehold or leasehold property in which the chargor has an interest at the date of the instrument.. All rights in respect of any know-how, patent, trademark, service mark, design, business name, topographical or similar right; any copyright or other intellectual property monopoly right; and any interest in any of the above.. For more details please refer to the instrument.
Fixed and floating charge over all property and assets present and future, including goodwill, book debts, uncalled capital, buildings, fixtures, fixed plant & machinery see image for full details.

secured_details.description: All monies due or to become due from any obligor to any secured creditor on any account whatsoever under the terms of the aforementioned instrument creating or evidencing the charge
